generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance MotorStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures motor states for cart movement and hoisting"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorStateSensor
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data from physical sensors including swing angle, wind speed, and motor states"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, MotorStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created in Autodesk Fusion360 for the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibPython
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibPython
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storage and querying of sensor and simulation data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for displaying real-time and historical data dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker for physical-to-virtual data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance GantryLibPython : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for controlling gantry crane system and processing data"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ValidationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for system design and evolution tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemDesignService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying DT services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories for the gantry crane using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics to predict behavior under various conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicValidationInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously validates real-time measurements against simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationBreachInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs sensor data to TimescaleDB for long-term storage and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes data through Grafana dashboards for operator monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance SystemDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages system design and evolution tracking using DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignEvolutionInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Deploys DT services using Docker containers"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory information for movement planning"
]

instance ValidationBreachInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notification of validation breaches for corrective actions"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data storage confirmation for time-series analysis"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visual representation of system data"
]

instance DynamicValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from simulation validation against real-time data"
]

instance DesignEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking of digital twin evolution through system design"
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Successful deployment of containerized DT services"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual intervention to address validation breaches"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoisting"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the end of the hoist for container pickup"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Port of Antwerp harbor cranes"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, MotorStateSensor, ArduinoMicrocontroller, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for movement and trajectory execution are sent from the Control Application via the Physical Crane Interface to the motors and electromagnet."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation integrates physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging, HMI) and digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) into a centralized system using MQTT for communication and TimescaleDB for data storage."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, continuously monitoring and validating the physical crane's real-time performance during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares measured trajectories with simulated ones, calculating distance metrics against predefined thresholds to ensure model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time communication between services, with data logged to TimescaleDB for historical storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a single personal computer using Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard services."
]
